mapper.select: SELECT ep.id AS periodId, ep.period AS period, ep.shares AS shares, ep.price AS price, ep.earning_yield AS earningYield, eps.sold AS sold, eps.total_sponsor AS totalSponsor, sles.holding_shares AS holdingShares, sles.holding_equity_value AS holdingEquityValue FROM oasis_latest_equity_period olep INNER JOIN oasis_equity_period ep ON olep.equity_period_id = ep.id LEFT JOIN oasis_equity_period_summary eps ON ep.id = eps.equity_period_id LEFT JOIN oasis_sponsor_latest_equity_summary sles ON ep.id = sles.equity_period_id AND sles.sponsor_brand_id = #{brandId} WHERE olep.oasis_id = #{oasisId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oasis_sponsor_latest_equity_summary ( id, oasis_id, equity_period_id, sponsor_brand_id, holding_shares, holding_equity_value, create_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{o.id}, #{o.oasisId}, #{o.equityPeriodId}, #{o.sponsorBrandId}, #{o.holdingShares}, #{o.holdingEquityValue}, #{o.createAt}, #{o.modifiedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE /* 因为新期开启已清空，此处的 UPDATE 仅处理本期内的追加购买 */ holding_shares = holding_shares + VALUES(holding_shares), holding_equity_value = holding_equity_value + VALUES(holding_equity_value), modified_at = VALUES(modified_at)
